title: dorycnium pentaphyllum var. elongatum
intro: Dorycnium pentaphyllum var. elongatum, also known as the elongated knapweed, is a flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dorycnium pentaphyllum var. elongatum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an anti-oxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and infusonal extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and salves.
